历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 39718 → 27220 → 29516 → 36748 → 38943, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In the past 3 years, it moved backward from 29516 to 38943, a cumulative backward shift of about 9400 places. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 38943. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hebei Province has been continuously expanding: 115 in 2021 → 133 in 2022 → 140 in 2023 → 155 in 2024 → 170 in 2025. In 2026, the Physics Category plan is 149, and the Medical Category plan is 49 (with the same source of Physics Category examinees), totaling 198, an increase of about 16.5% compared to 2025, significantly increasing admission slots and easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university. On the Soft Science China University Main Ranking, it is approximately 74th in 2026, with a stable range of 69–78 in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle comprehensive universities. The reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is relatively positive. Positive events such as Nanchang University's men's volleyball team winning the National College Volleyball League championship have increased the university's exposure. Douyin popularity ranking is 43rd (relatively hot), with short video platform attention at an upper-middle level, which may slightly increase application enthusiasm. Food Science and Engineering is an A+ discipline (top in the country), directly corresponding to the university's food-related enrollment majors. Although Materials Science and Engineering, Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, etc., have not received A-level ratings, they have high social recognition.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, aligning with the university's main enrollment directions for Physics Category. The total number of Hebei Province college entrance examination registrations in 2026 is approximately 609,800, a slight increase of about 0.5% from about 606,800 in 2025. The estimated number of Physics Category examinees is about 365,000, with competition levels basically unchanged. Nanchang University is located in Jiangxi Province, relatively far from Hebei, making it a cross-province application. The university's enrollment plan in Hebei Province continues to expand, with a total of 198 for Physics Category and Medical Category in 2026, which is a relatively large enrollment scale among out-of-province universities, attracting some Hebei candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating backward trend of historical rankings, the easing of competition due to a significant enrollment expansion of about 16.5% in 2026, the relatively positive university reputation and the increase in application attention due to high Douyin popularity, as well as the slight intensification of competition due to a marginal increase in the total number of Hebei candidates. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 42692, with a range of 42192–43192.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南昌大学是国家211工程重点建设高校、国家双一流建设高校，综合实力位居全国中上游。医学部拥有完整的本-硕-博培养体系，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业在区域内认可度 较高。作为江西省唯一211高校，虽地处中部地区，但对河北考生仍具有较强吸引力，尤其是医学类专业的就业前景稳定，报考热度持续不减。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 近年来医学类专业全国报考热度持续高涨，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业竞争激烈，位次门槛逐年提高。南昌大学位于江西省南昌市，虽非一线城市，但作为区域性医疗人才 培养基地，其医学毕业生在华东及华北地区就业渠道畅通。河北省医学类招生规模从2021年30人逐步扩至2026年49人，规模扩大有助于缓解部分竞争压力，但整体供不应求格局未 变。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型计算与历年趋势分析，预计2026年南昌大学医学类最低录取位次约为44069名，较2025年（39881名）继续小幅上升，主要受医学报考热度持续、低分段专业缩 招等因素推动。波动区间预计在43669至44469之间，考生可据此合理定位。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2021, the minimum ranking for Medicine was 17968 (planned enrollment 30). In 2022, it rose sharply to 33069 (planned enrollment expanded to 41). In 2023, it was 34194 (planned enrollment 39, slightly reduced). In 2024, it was 35924 (planned enrollment 41). In 2025, it was 39881 (planned enrollment 42). Over five years, the ranking has continuously increased, rising by a total of 21913 places, reflecting the growing popularity of medical applications year by year. In 2026, the planned enrollment expands to 49 (+7, +16.67%), including an increase of 4 in Clinical Medicine (10→14), but a reduction of 2 in Nursing (5→3) and a reduction of 1 in Basic Medicine (5→4), while adding Pharmacy (5) and Medical Imaging AI Dual Degree (2). The reduction in low-score segment majors pushes up the minimum ranking, while the addition of Pharmacy may attract some mid-to-low score candidates. Overall, the expansion is significant but the structural changes are complex.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanchang University is a key national university under the 211 Project and a national Double First-Class construction university, with comprehensive strength ranking in the upper-middle level nationwide. The Medical College has a complete bachelor-master-doctor training system, and core majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology have high regional recognition. As the only 211 university in Jiangxi Province, although located in the central region, it still has strong appeal to Hebei candidates, especially due to the stable employment prospects of medical majors, leading to sustained application enthusiasm.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the national application enthusiasm for medical majors has been consistently high, with fierce competition in core majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology, and the ranking threshold has been increasing year by year. Nanchang University is located in Nanchang City, Jiangxi Province. Although not a first-tier city, as a regional medical talent training base, its medical graduates have smooth employment channels in East China and North China. The enrollment scale for medical majors in Hebei Province has gradually expanded from 30 in 2021 to 49 in 2026. The scale expansion helps alleviate some competitive pressure, but the overall supply-demand imbalance remains unchanged.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the comprehensive supply-demand elasticity model calculation and historical trend analysis, it is estimated that the minimum admission ranking for Nanchang University's Medicine in 2026 will be approximately 44069, continuing a slight increase from 2025 (39881), mainly driven by the sustained popularity of medical applications and the reduction in low-score segment majors. The fluctuation range is expected to be between 43669 and 44469. Candidates can position themselves accordingly.
